mainEntity.name: What if AEO content violates Texas ethics for Houston lawyers?
mainEntity.text: What if AEO content violates Texas ethics for Houston lawyers?

acceptedAnswer.text: Violations like false claims in AEO content risk Texas bar sanctions; use disclaimers, source facts, and pre-approve with compliance review.[3]

suggestedAnswer.text: Texas rules scrutinize advertising; AEO's prominence amplifies risks. Implement review processes. Agencies should certify ethics compliance. Penalties deter visibility gains—prioritize.[1]

name: Texas Ethics Risks in Houston AEO
description: Violations like false claims in AEO content risk Texas bar sanctions; use disclaimers, source facts, and pre-approve with compliance review.[3]
